content: Hi, I'm Finley, nice to chat with you. I've been so busy with my startup that I haven't had much time to read lately.
Nice to chat with you too, Finley. Startups can be very demanding. What kind of startup are you working on?
We're developing AI tools. It's exciting but also a lot of work. I've been trying to find time for my hobbies, like origami and woodworking, but it's been tough.

AI tools sound like a fascinating project. Origami and woodworking are great hobbies for relaxation. Have you found any books or resources that help you manage your time or find balance between work and hobbies?
Actually, I've been looking for something like that. Maybe a book on productivity or time management would be helpful. I've also been considering getting into 3D printing as a new hobby.

There are many great books on productivity and time management. 3D printing is a fantastic hobby that can be very rewarding. You might find that it complements your work in AI and your interest in woodworking.
That's what I thought. I've been wanting to try out some new projects, maybe print some custom parts for my woodworking tools.
Custom parts can be a great way to enhance your tools. If you're looking for inspiration, there are many online communities and forums dedicated to 3D printing and woodworking.
I'll check those out. I've also been meaning to plan a trip back to the States, maybe visit my family in California. It's been a while since I've been back.

It's always nice to visit family. California is a great place to visit, with a lot to see and do. If you're looking for something to read before your trip, maybe a book set in California or about technology and innovation could be interesting.
That sounds like a good idea. I've been living in Lisbon, Portugal, for a while now, and while I love it here, it's always nice to go back home.
Lisbon is a beautiful city. The blend of old and new, especially in terms of technology and innovation, might give you some interesting perspectives for your startup.
Definitely. I've been trying to take care of my aging parents while working full-time, so it's been a challenge, but we're managing.

It's great that you're prioritizing your family. Balancing work and family responsibilities can be tough, but it sounds like you're handling it well. If you need any recommendations for books on caregiving or managing stress, I'd be happy to help.
Thanks, I appreciate that. Just talking about this has been helpful. Maybe I'll find a book that can offer some new insights or advice.
Sometimes just discussing our challenges can help clarify things. I hope you find a book that resonates with you, and good luck with your startup and personal endeavors.
